tagline: Fixed an issue where Databricks SQL boxplot visualizations with only a categorical x axis did not display categories and bars correctly.
what_it_does: Fixed an issue where Databricks SQL boxplot visualizations with only a categorical x axis did not display categories and bars correctly. Visualizations now render as expected.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Fixed an issue where Databricks SQL boxplot visualizations with only a categorical x axis did not display categories and bars correctly. Visualizations now render as expected.
key_takeaway: Fixed an issue where Databricks SQL boxplot visualizations with only a categorical x axis did not display categories and bars correctly.
